errorPage.forbiddenDescription: Sorry, you do not have permission to access this page. Please contact support or go back.
errorPage.notFoundDescription: Sorry, the page you are looking for could not be found. Please check the URL or go back.

errors.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: Login failed. Please check your email or password.
errors.BLOCK_TIME_ALREADY_EXIST: There is already a block time in this date range. Please select another date range
errors.CANNOT_DELETE_SELF: You cannot delete your own account at this page.
errors.COUPON_ALREADY_EXIST: Duplicate coupon! This coupon code has already existed
errors.COURSE_NOT_AVAILABLE_UNPUBLISHED: The course is not published yet. You cannot assign it to a student.
errors.ENROLL_COURSE_NOT_FOUND: The enrollment course could not be found.
errors.INVALID_DATA: The data you have entered is invalid. Please check again.
errors.INVALID_EXPRIRE_DATE: Error: Please select a valid date.
errors.INVALID_FILE_CSV: The file you uploaded is invalid. Please check again.
errors.INVALID_PHONE_NUMBER_FOR_USER: The user's phone number is invalid. Please check if you have entered a valid phone number for the user
errors.invalidLink: The provided URL is not valid. Please ensure it is correctly formatted and includes the necessary components such as the protocol (e.g., 'http://', 'https://').
errors.LESSON_DATE_TIME_BLOCKED: There is a block time for this date. Please choose a different time.
errors.MISSING_CLASS_DATA: The course information is missing, please choose again
errors.network: Network error. Either our servers are down or your Internet connection is unstable.
errors.NO_CLASS_CHOSEN: Please select the course you want to enroll in
errors.NO_STUDENT_SCHEDULES_FOUND: No student schedules found for the next month
errors.NOT_AUTHENTICATE: You do not have the access to this action. Please refresh the page or try logging in again.
errors.PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE: The file name: {{name}} you uploaded exceeds 10MB. Please try again.
errors.QUOTA_STUDENTS_ACTIVE_EXCEED: The number of students active exceeds the quota.
errors.required: This field is required. Please fill it in.
errors.SERVER_ERROR: There is server-side error. We would appreciate if you can report this to us.
errors.STUDENT_ALREADY_EXIST_IN_CLASS_OF_THIS_T: Student already exist in class of this time
errors.STUDENT_EMAIL_EXIST: This email address is already in use
errors.TOO_MANY_REQUEST: The OpenAI system is overloaded, please try again later
errors.TRIAL_LESSON_ALREADY_EXIST: A trial lesson for this user already exists.
errors.TRIAL_LESSON_NOT_FOUND: The trial lesson could not be found.
errors.USER_NOT_ALREADY_MANAGER_OF_INSTITUTION: User not already manager of institution
